overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the player character Arthur Morgan walking through a scenic mountain canyon, crossing a wooden bridge over a river, and ascending a rocky hillside. The environment features dramatic rock formations, pine trees, and snow-capped mountains in the distance with high-fidelity game engine rendering.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canyon floor path between tall rock walls

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
large rocky cliff with sparse vegetation on the right side
tall evergreen tree growing from the rock formation
narrow dirt path winding through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a rocky canyon, flanked by tall stone walls on both sides. Sparse vegetation and a tall pine tree are visible as the character approaches a wooden structure in the distance.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing the river

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge over the flowing river below

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway with railings
flowing river visible below and to the right of the bridge
wooden fence railing along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden footbridge over a flowing river, with the canyon walls rising on the left and the water rushing below. The wooden planks and railings of the bridge dominate the foreground as the character moves across.

events.description: exits bridge and continues along the riverbank with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank with the water flowing on the right and mountains ahead

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with snow visible on the summits
fast-flowing water with visible current and rocks

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character follows a dirt trail alongside the rushing river, with dramatic snow-capped mountains now visible in the distance ahead. The canyon walls continue on the left while the river flows on the right.

events.description: character begins ascending steeper rocky slope away from river

agents.ego_description: climbing up the steep rocky hillside path moving away from the river below

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising sharply on the left side
leafless dead tree trunk near the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the river and begins ascending a steep rocky slope, with a sheer rock face on the left and the river now visible far below to the right. The terrain becomes more rugged and elevated as the character climbs higher.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually opens up into a high-altitude mountain ascent. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail flanked by tall stone walls and sparse pine trees, moving steadily toward a distant wooden structure. As the path reaches the water, the camera follows the character across a wooden footbridge over a rushing river, with the canyon walls continuing to rise sharply on the left. The scene then expands as the character follows the riverbank, revealing dramatic snow-capped mountains in the distance before turning away from the water. Finally, the camera ascends a steep, rugged slope, leaving the river far below to the right as the character climbs higher against a sheer rock face.
